title: LLM evaluation + benchmarks + LLM-as-judge + DSA Intervals
focus: Perplexity vs MMLU vs GPQA vs SWE-bench; judge calibration.

items.label: Perplexity: what it is and isn't
interviewQuestions: Define perplexity precisely — and explain why it's a poor proxy for downstream task quality.
Two models with the same perplexity perform very differently on a benchmark. What's going on?

items.label: Benchmarks: MMLU, HumanEval, GPQA, SWE-bench
interviewQuestions: Compare MMLU vs GPQA vs SWE-bench — what does each measure?
Why has benchmark contamination become a serious issue?

items.label: LLM-as-judge: design, biases, calibration
interviewQuestions: When is LLM-as-judge reliable, and what biases does it introduce?
How would you calibrate an LLM judge to human preferences?

items.label: Generation metrics: BLEU, ROUGE, BERTScore, exact match
interviewQuestions: Compare BLEU, ROUGE, BERTScore, exact match, and perplexity — what does each miss?
Why are BLEU and ROUGE weak signals for open-ended assistant answers?
How would you combine automatic metrics, human review, and LLM-as-judge in one eval harness?

tracks.label: ML Coding Lab · Evaluation harness implementation

items.label: Build a small eval harness with datasets, scorers, slices, and regression thresholds
interviewQuestions: How would you design an eval harness that runs on every prompt or model change?
What is the minimum schema for an eval case: input, expected behavior, rubric, metadata, and slice?
How do you prevent one aggregate score from hiding a regression in a high-risk segment?

items.label: Implement pairwise LLM-judge scoring with calibration against human labels
interviewQuestions: Why are pairwise comparisons often more reliable than open-ended judge scoring?
How would you estimate agreement between an LLM judge and human reviewers?
What bias appears if the judge prefers longer or more confident answers?

items.label: Turn red-team failures into repeatable regression tests
interviewQuestions: How do you convert a one-off prompt-injection failure into a permanent regression test?
Which OWASP LLM risks belong in a release-blocking test suite?
How do you keep red-team tests from becoming stale as the product changes?

references.label: AWS mapping to OWASP Top 10 for LLM applications
